A bulbous-nosed '''class''' of [[Frigate/Legends|frigates]] was still in service during the [[Corellian Crisis]], when the [[Sacorrian Triad]] modified four frigates into [[robot ramship]]s and used them to attack the [[Bakuran]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]'' {{1st}}
